news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY and RTYY

holdings.infoBox: NUGY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST Gold Miners ETF (NUGY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund is an actively managed fund seeking to provide weekly income. The fund strategy involves writing put options on 2x daily leveraged ETFs tied to the NYSE Arca Gold Miners Index. NUGY was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
